amendatorysection.para: In all counties having a population of one hundred fifty thousand or more inhabitants as determined by the most recent federal decennial census, the county clerk or the county clerk's designee shall keep a perpetual inventory of all personal property of the county.

annotation.para: Failure to carry out provisions of section will not justify removal of officer in absence of evil intent. Hiatt v. Tomlinson, 100 Neb. 51, 158 N.W. 383 (1916).
